content: NEVER run inline Python via PowerShell python -c. ALWAYS write to temp .py file. Every script MUST set UTF-8: sys.stdout = open(sys.stdout.fileno(), mode='w', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'). Use safe_shell.py: check|run|env-check|shadow-audit. For inline: spy 'print(1+1)' after dot-sourcing agent_profile.ps1.
